note: Golden STT test set. Audio clips live in ./audio/<id>.wav — synthesized via Azure TTS (male voices, independent of the recognizers under test) until replaced by real recordings. `spoken` is what the voice says; `text` + altSpellings are accepted transcriptions; `entity` is the exact string the form needs.
